article_title: Quantum Motion Closes $160 Million Series C Co-Led by DCVC and Kembara to Scale Silicon-CMOS Qubits Into Standard Server Racks

content_preview.title: Quantum Motion Closes $160 Million Series C Co-Led by DCVC and Kembara to Scale Silicon-CMOS Qubits Into Standard Server Racks
content_preview.summary: London-based Quantum Motion has raised $160 million in Series C funding co-led by DCVC and Kembara to commercialize silicon-CMOS quantum processors that the company says fit in three standard server racks.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

London-based quantum computing startup Quantum Motion announced a $160 million Series C funding round on May 7, 2026, co-led by DCVC and Kembara, according to [The Quantum Insider](https://thequantuminsider.com/2026/05/07/quantum-motion-160m-series-c-silicon-quantum-computing/). The company is building quantum processors using the same silicon-CMOS manufacturing technology that produces conventional smartphone and server chips, and the new round is meant to take its platform from a ...

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-structured 649-word News piece with clear sectioning (Investors, Technology, NQCC, DARPA, Company, Quotes). Hedged appropriately on forward-looking 100x/1000x claims.
editor_notes.source_verification: All 4 sources fetched cleanly (200 OK). Read every snapshot from disk. Funding amount and co-leads (DCVC, Kembara) verified across all 4 sources. Mundi Ventures parent attribution verified in cited authority (Quantum Computing Report). $250M Firgun fund size, £62M historical raise, £42M Series B verified in cited authority (companion Quantum Insider piece). Hoxton readout chip and 100x sensitivity verified in cited authority (SiliconANGLE). 'Three server racks' size verified verbatim in SiliconANGLE. Stage B / DARPA QBI selection verified across multiple snapshots. Two direct quotes (Palles-Dimmock 'silicon is the strongest route to achieving that' and Naudts 'unlocking the power') verified verbatim in their cited authorities.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Every specific (funding amount, investor names, company executives, technical claims, DARPA participation, historical funding) traces to its cited authority. Multi-source corroboration on all major facts.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional. Forward-looking claims explicitly attributed to the company; no editorializing.
editor_notes.originality: No archive collision. Distinct from prior quantum coverage in 2026 archive.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Clean APPROVE. Multi-sourced, well-attributed funding announcement ready for publication as-is.
